concept: I take coffee breaks to avoid accidental manslaughter.
title: Funny Coffee Lover Shirt for Adults - Coffee Breaks Over Manslaughter
description:
Sometimes a coffee break isn’t about the caffeine—it’s about saving lives. This hilarious design captures the raw essence of dealing with work, people, and general chaos: sip coffee or risk a felony. Perfect for anyone whose patience meter is fueled exclusively by espresso shots and chilly cold brew. A must-have for coffee enthusiasts, office warriors, and anyone who laughs to cope.

Perfect for:
- Coffee addicts who need their daily dose (or three) to function
- Office workers navigating unnecessary meetings and chatty coworkers
- Sarcastic gift-givers who know someone dealing with daily chaos
- Anyone who needs their humor as strong as their coffee

DETAILS:
This bold design stands out on all colors with clean typography that reads: 'I take coffee breaks to avoid accidental manslaughter.' The text is balanced with a playful coffee cup and a tiny 'rage meter' illustration for extra flair. Made for maximum laughs and minimalist vibes, this design is available in a full range of colors and sizes. Crafted on demand with care, just for you.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
